terms.canonical_name: Food Contact Utensils, Containers and Packaging
terms.notes: Taiwan Article 26 labeling applies to designated food utensils, containers and packaging, especially plastic food-contact surfaces. Material sanitation checks also route to the sanitation standards for utensils, containers and packages.

aliases.value: Sanitation Standards for Food Utensils, Containers and Packages
DEHP DNOP DBP BBP children under three
食品器具容器包裝衛生標準
塑膠嬰兒奶瓶不得含雙酚A
三歲以下兒童食品器具容器
不得回收重新包裝食品
食品器具容器包装卫生标准

terms.notes: Routes Taiwan food-contact material safety searches to the sanitation standards: recycled plastic containers/packages cannot be reused to repackage food for sale, products should be free of discoloration/off odor/contamination/mould/foreign matter, children-under-three utensils and containers cannot add DEHP/DNOP/DBP/BBP, plastic infant feeding bottles cannot contain BPA, and applicable standard tests should be documented.
Plastic food-contact packaging should show food-contact use and reusable/disposable status, and product labels should support safe heating and use conditions.
